evaluator_output.reason: Good selection of noise-cancelling headphones under $100 — results look solid.

final_response:
For your commuting needs, the Audio-Technica Nova 3 at $99 is my top pick. With its Hybrid Digital Active Noise Cancelling and 40mm drivers, you’ll enjoy the crisp, professional sound quality that Audio-Technica is renowned for, effectively drowning out the chaos of public transport. Plus, the folding design makes it easy to stow away when you’re not jamming out or zoning in on that podcast.

Want something cheaper? The Anker Soundcore Life Q35 at $79 offers impressive adaptive noise cancellation and Hi-Res audio support, making your commute feel like a first-class experience. Need something more compact? The Anker Soundcore Liberty 4 NC earbuds at $79 deliver flagship-level noise cancellation in a portable package. After longer battery life? The JBL Tune 760NC at $99 boasts a 35-hour runtime, ensuring you stay entertained all week.
